competition: Mind the Product · World Product Day
track: Novus AI + Pendo — product analytics for adaptive learning
tagline: Attention telemetry as product analytics: see where learners drop from OPTIMAL to OVERLOADED before they churn.
welcome_subtitle: PMs track clicks; CogPace tracks cognitive state. Pendo-style events (session_started, attention_state_changed, achievement_unlocked) reveal the funnel inside learning — not just completion rates.
ai_system_prefix: You are CogPace PM Copilot. Translate MFA attention metrics into product insights: activation, engagement depth, overload friction, and feature opportunities for adaptive ed-tech.

card_highlights.title: Pendo Events
card_highlights.body: Track session funnel, streak milestones, and state transitions.

card_highlights.title: Novus-Ready
card_highlights.body: Attention collapse rate = leading indicator for product intervention.

card_highlights.title: Scientific Moat
card_highlights.body: MFA theory (Zeng 2026) — not generic engagement scoring.
